idea-plugin.name: Stryke
idea-plugin.description:
JetBrains IDE support for stryke — a massively parallel scripting language (Rust bytecode VM + Cranelift JIT) embeddable in zshrs.

  • .stk file association with a 44-slot color scheme (keywords / declarations / control flow / sigils / operators / regex / topic vars / block params).
  • LSP integration via st --lsp: completion (with 60+ snippet templates), hover, goto-definition, find-references, rename, document symbols, signature help, semantic tokens, diagnostics, code actions (Extract to variable / constant / function), folding ranges (every { ... }, =pod ... =cut, comment runs), document formatting (Cmd-Opt-L → reformat through stryke's built-in formatter).
  • Debugger over Debug Adapter Protocol (st --dap): line + function breakpoints from the gutter, step over / into / out / pause / run-to-cursor, frames, recursive Variables panel that drills through hashes, arrays, structs, classes, enums, sets, and every sketch type (TDigest / Bloom / HLL / CMS / TopK with their stats), Evaluate dialog, real-time Console output.
  • Run configurations for .stk scripts with toggles for --no-interop / --disasm / --profile / --flame / -d / -D.
  • Comments: # line comments (Cmd-/). Multi-line selection + Cmd-/ prepends # to every line.
  • Reflection tool window with 9 tabs of %stryke::* (~25k entries) — searchable trees, left-click for docs popup, right-click for Show Docs / Copy Name.
  • Settings → Tools → Stryke to point at a non-PATH st binary or pass extra LSP args / env.

Requirements: a paid JetBrains IDE on 2024.2+ (RustRover, IDEA Ultimate, GoLand, PyCharm Pro, WebStorm, etc.) because stryke uses the platform LSP API. Community editions are not supported.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.14.4

  • Initial release: .stk file type, 44-slot color scheme, lexer-based highlighting, LSP client, run configurations, DAP debugger, reflection tool window.
  • LSP code actions: Extract to variable / constant / function.
  • LSP folding ranges (brace blocks, POD, comment runs) and document formatting.
  • 60+ snippet completions (match, if/elsif/else, class/struct/enum/trait, parallel primitives, web / SVG / git scaffolds, full test-file template).
  • Debugger Variables panel: rich drill-down for struct / class / enum / set / sketch types; topic and Perl-5 sort/reduce params ($_, $_N, $a, $b) sort below user my vars.
  • Step-over / step-in fixes: depth tracking via debugger enter_sub / leave_sub hooks, and a depth-aware same-line guard so step-in enters UDFs on a single click.
  • Lexer line-drift fix: fat-arrow lookahead and qw/q/qq/qx/qr/m/s/tr/y bareword-vs- quote-operator lookaheads now restore self.line alongside self.pos, so breakpoints fire on the correct line in scripts containing class fields.

action.description: Run the selected .stk file with the stryke interpreter
